⚠️ IMPORTANT: Add this field to your config.json files
_comment: TCP port for peer discovery - allows remote Rust nodes to query this Go Master for epoch/validator info
_usage_local: Set to 0 to disable TCP listener (local deployment only)
_usage_distributed: Set to unique port for each node (e.g., 19200 for node 0, 19201 for node 1, etc.)
